mapper.select: SELECT A.CA_NUM, A.CA_DATE, NVL(P.AVG_PROGRESS, 0) AS PROGRESS, C.CLA_NUM, C.CLA_TITLE AS claName, E.ER_PASS, E.ER_SCORE, CASE WHEN R.REP_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS feedbackYN FROM ClassApply A JOIN Class C ON A.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT USER_NUM, CLA_NUM, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 100) AS AVG_PROGRESS FROM PROGRESS GROUP BY USER_NUM, CLA_NUM ) P ON (A.USER_NUM = P.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = P.CLA_NUM) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ER.USER_NUM, T.CLA_NUM, ER.ER_PASS, ER.ER_SCORE, ER.ER_NUM -- ER_NUM 추가 FROM EXAM_RESULT ER JOIN TEST T ON ER.TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM ) E ON (A.USER_NUM = E.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = E.CLA_NUM) LEFT OUTER JOIN REPUTATION R ON (A.USER_NUM = R.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = R.CLA_NUM) WHERE A.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND E.ER_SCORE IS NULL ORDER BY A.CA_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ClassApply WHERE USER_NUM = #{userNum}
SELECT A.CA_NUM, A.CA_DATE, C.CLA_NUM, C.CLA_TITLE FROM ClassApply A JOIN Class C ON A.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM WHERE A.CA_NUM = #{caNum}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ClassApply(CA_NUM, USER_NUM, CLA_NUM, CA_DATE) VALUES(#{caNum}, #{userNum}, #{claNum}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT SEQ_CLASSAPPLY.NEXTVAL AS CA_NUM FROM DUAL

SELECT A.CA_NUM, A.USER_NUM, A.CLA_NUM, NVL(P.AVG_PROGRESS, 0) AS PROGRESS, C.CLA_TITLE, C.CLA_TITLE AS claName, E.ER_SCORE, E.ER_PASS, CASE WHEN R.REP_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS feedbackYN FROM ClassApply A JOIN Class C ON A.CLA_NUM = C.CLA_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT USER_NUM, CLA_NUM, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN PRG_COMPLETE = 'Y' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*) * 100) AS AVG_PROGRESS FROM PROGRESS GROUP BY USER_NUM, CLA_NUM ) P ON (A.USER_NUM = P.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = P.CLA_NUM) LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ER.USER_NUM, T.CLA_NUM, ER.ER_PASS, ER.ER_SCORE FROM EXAM_RESULT ER JOIN TEST T ON ER.TET_NUM = T.TET_NUM ) E ON (A.USER_NUM = E.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = E.CLA_NUM) LEFT OUTER JOIN REPUTATION R ON (A.USER_NUM = R.USER_NUM AND A.CLA_NUM = R.CLA_NUM) WHERE A.USER_NUM = #{userNum} AND E.ER_SCORE IS NOT NULL
